indicators.description: Households with a broadband internet subscription

indicators.description: Adults 25+ with a bachelor's degree or higher

indicators.description: Adults 25+ with at least a high school diploma

indicators.description: Enrolled students attending private school

indicators.description: Households with no vehicle available

indicators.description: Workers with a commute of 20+ minutes

indicators.description: Workers who commute by driving alone

indicators.label: Median household income
indicators.description: Median annual household income

indicators.label: Median age
indicators.description: Median age of residents, in years

indicators.label: Poverty rate
indicators.description: Share of people with income below the federal poverty level

indicators.description: Share of the civilian labor force that is unemployed

indicators.label: Rent-burdened households
indicators.description: Share of renter households paying 30%+ of income on gross rent

indicators.label: Households receiving SNAP
indicators.description: Share of households that received SNAP (food stamp) benefits in the past year

indicators.label: Limited-English-speaking households
indicators.description: Share of households where no one 14+ speaks English "very well"
indicators.source: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates

indicators.label: No health insurance (adults 18–64)
indicators.description: Share of adults aged 18–64 without health insurance
indicators.source: CDC PLACES (model-based small-area estimates)

indicators.label: Obesity (adults)
indicators.description: Share of adults with obesity (BMI ≥ 30)
indicators.source: CDC PLACES (model-based small-area estimates)

indicators.label: Diabetes (adults)
indicators.description: Share of adults ever told they have diabetes
indicators.source: CDC PLACES (model-based small-area estimates)

indicators.label: Frequent mental distress (adults)
indicators.description: Share of adults reporting 14+ days of poor mental health in the past month
indicators.source: CDC PLACES (model-based small-area estimates)

indicators.description: Total resident population

indicators.label: Population density (per sq mi)
indicators.description: Residents per square mile of land area

indicators.label: Average household size
indicators.description: Average number of people per occupied household

indicators.description: Households with one or more people under 18

indicators.label: Households with seniors
indicators.description: Households with one or more people 65+

indicators.label: Owner cost burden
indicators.description: Owner households paying 30%+ of income on housing costs

indicators.label: Homes built since 2010
indicators.description: Housing units built in 2010 or later
indicators.source: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates

indicators.label: Income inequality (Gini)
indicators.description: Gini index of income inequality (0 = equal, 1 = unequal)

indicators.label: School enrollment (age 3+)
indicators.description: Population age 3+ enrolled in school

indicators.description: Employed residents in management, business, science, and arts occupations

indicators.label: Mean travel time to work (min)
indicators.description: Average one-way commute time for workers (minutes)

indicators.label: Health insurance coverage
indicators.description: Residents (all ages) with health insurance coverage

indicators.label: Disability (any)
indicators.description: Civilian noninstitutionalized residents with a disability

indicators.label: Foreign-born residents
indicators.description: Residents born outside the United States

indicators.label: Child poverty (families w/ children)
indicators.description: Families with related children under 18 whose income is below poverty

indicators.label: Forest cover
indicators.description: Share of land classified as forest (deciduous, evergreen, mixed)
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)

indicators.label: Cropland & farmland
indicators.description: Share of land in agriculture (cultivated crops + pasture/hay)
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)

indicators.label: Wetlands
indicators.description: Share of land classified as wetland (woody + emergent herbaceous)
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)

indicators.label: Developed land
indicators.description: Share of land that is developed (open space through high intensity)
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)

indicators.label: Impervious surface
indicators.description: Average share of surface that is impervious (pavement, rooftops)
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)

indicators.label: Light pollution (night lights)
indicators.description: Average nighttime-light radiance (nW/cm²/sr) — a measure of artificial light at night
indicators.source: Earth Observation Group, VIIRS Nighttime Lights (VNL V2)

indicators.label: Tree canopy
indicators.description: Average percent tree-canopy cover (continuous), from NLCD Tree Canopy Cover
indicators.source: U.S. Geological Survey, National Land Cover Database (NLCD)
